  • Enum Classes
    Class
    Description
    AddStepType
    Rule for determining when to add to a position during averaging down.
    DecisionBasis
    Method used for downside decision making.
    DipReferenceType
    Reference method for calculating whether a dip has occurred.
    Direction
    Position direction the strategy is allowed to take.
    EntryType
    Type of entry strategy for opening a new position.
    IndicatorType
    Technical indicator types used in indicator and statistical rules.
    LossAction
    Action to take when a loss condition is triggered.
    OrderType
    Execution order type for trades.
    PriceField
    Which price field to use for strategy calculations.
    ReferencePrice
    Reference point for gain/loss calculation.
    SellFractionBasis
    Basis for computing the sell fraction in partial profit taking.
    SizingMode
    Method for determining position size.
    StopType
    Stop-loss variant for sell-on-loss action.
    TriggerType
    What triggers a scale-out or take-profit event.
    UniverseMode
    Defines how the strategy selects assets to trade.
